title: [MTR3/4]CTA_Trains
description: This resource pack adds Chicago L Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
## Introduction

This resource pack adds Chicago L Trains for MTR3/4

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 (NTE)

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

## Contents

* Chicago L 2600, 5000, 7000 Series
* Trains must be produced in even numbers while using MTR3 version
